positive: An intricate, symmetrical mandala-style illustration depicting interconnected celestial flora and stylized mythical fauna (e.g., subtle phoenix or winged serpent outlines). The primary elements should be defined by strong, elegant silhouettes and clean line work. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, and ethereal silver. The style should evoke a mix of Art Nouveau etching and sacred geometry, rendered with crisp, high-detail vector quality. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for repeating or single-placement apparel print, emphasizing negative space and visual balance. Overhead studio lighting, minimalist background.
negative: artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, blur, grain, noise, jpeg artifacts, cropped, low resolution, cartoon, childish, messy, messy lines
